usage: get_snap_grid_info [-help] [-origin] [-pitch_x] [-pitch_y] -type {manufacturing inst placement userDefine LayerTrack finfetInst finfetManufacturing finfetPlacement}

options.name: -origin
options.description: Specify to get the original point of grid.

options.name: -pitch_x
options.description: Specify to get the X-direction pitch of grid.

options.name: -pitch_y
options.description: Specify to get the Y-direction pitch of grid.

options.name: -type
options.description: {manufacturing inst placement userDefine LayerTrack finfetInst finfetManufacturing finfetPlacement} Specify the grid type which you want to get info.
